Sunnybank.zoning_summary: Low Density Residential with commercial zones along Mains Road corridor. Neighbourhood centres with retail and food precincts.
Sunnybank.zoning_summary_cn: 以低密度住宅区为主，沿 Mains Road 走廊设有商业区。邻里中心提供零售和美食街区，是布里斯班华人聚居核心区域。

key_projects.name: Sunnybank Market Square Redevelopment
key_projects.name_cn: Sunnybank Market Square 重建项目
key_projects.description: $40M redevelopment with 7,911sqm retail extension, 304 car parks, laneway dining precinct
key_projects.description_cn: 投资4000万澳元的重建项目，新增7,911平方米零售面积，304个停车位，以及巷道式餐饮街区。该项目大幅提升了 Sunnybank 作为华人商圈核心的吸引力，增加了更多亚洲美食和零售选择。完工后预计将吸引更多华人商户入驻，进一步巩固该区域作为布里斯班最大华人商业中心的地位。

key_projects.name: Sunnybank Community & Sports Club Renovation
key_projects.name_cn: Sunnybank 社区体育俱乐部翻新
key_projects.description: Multi-stage renovation including sports bar, kitchen expansion, gym upgrade, outdoor spaces
key_projects.description_cn: 多阶段翻新工程，包括运动酒吧、厨房扩建、健身房升级和户外空间改造。该项目为当地居民提供了更好的社区活动设施，包括适合华人社区的健身和社交场所。

key_projects.name: Sunny Central Shopping Centre Extension
key_projects.name_cn: Sunny Central 购物中心扩建
key_projects.description: Purpose-built commercial building at 95 Mains Road with food/drink tenancies and streetscape improvements
key_projects.description_cn: 位于 Mains Road 95号的定制商业建筑，设有餐饮租户和街景改善工程。该项目将引入更多华人餐饮和零售品牌，提升 Mains Road 商业走廊的整体品质和步行体验。

infrastructure: Brisbane Metro M1 (Eight Mile Plains to Roma Street) - nearest major transit connection
Stable Swamp Creek stormwater management upgrades
Brisbane City Plan 2014 Minor Amendment Package R (Aug 2024)
infrastructure_cn: 布里斯班 Metro M1线（八英里平原至罗马街）- 最近的主要公共交通连接
Stable Swamp Creek 雨水管理系统升级
布里斯班城市规划2014 小修正案 R（2024年8月）

Eight Mile Plains.zoning_summary: Mix of Low Density, Low-Medium Density Residential, and Emerging Community zones. Gateway Neighbourhood Plan (adopted Nov 2022) guides development around bus station.
Eight Mile Plains.zoning_summary_cn: 混合低密度、低中密度住宅区和新兴社区区域。Gateway 邻里规划（2022年11月通过）指导公交站周边开发。该区域是布里斯班南区重要的交通枢纽，未来发展潜力巨大。

key_projects.name: Brisbane Metro (M1 Line)
key_projects.name_cn: 布里斯班地铁 M1 线
key_projects.description: $1.6B rapid transit with Eight Mile Plains as key terminus. 60 electric vehicles, 65 chargers, 2,300+ solar panels
key_projects.description_cn: 投资16亿澳元的快速公交项目，八英里平原是关键终点站。配备60辆电动车辆、65个充电桩和超过2,300块太阳能电池板。Metro M1 线将大幅缩短前往布里斯班CBD的通勤时间，预计完工后将显著提升周边房产价值。

key_projects.name: M1 Pacific Motorway Eight Mile Plains to Daisy Hill Upgrade
key_projects.name_cn: M1 太平洋高速八英里平原至 Daisy Hill 升级
key_projects.description: $750M upgrade widening M1 to 5 northbound lanes, extended SE Busway to Springwood, new Rochedale bus station
key_projects.description_cn: 投资7.5亿澳元的高速公路升级，将 M1 北行扩展至5条车道，东南公交专用道延伸至 Springwood，新建 Rochedale 公交站。已完成，大幅改善南区通勤条件。

key_projects.name: Satellite Health Centre
key_projects.name_cn: 卫星医疗中心
key_projects.description: $65.4M health facility with Minor Injury Clinic, dialysis, cancer therapy, medical imaging. Open 8am-10pm 7 days
key_projects.description_cn: 投资6,540万澳元的医疗设施，提供轻伤诊所、透析、癌症治疗和医学影像服务。每天8:00-22:00开放，无需前往大型医院即可获得专业医疗，对华人家庭尤其是老年人非常重要。

infrastructure: Brisbane Metro depot completed Sept 2024
Eight Mile Plains Gateway Neighbourhood Plan (Nov 2022)
South East Busway extension to Springwood completed
Logan and Gold Coast Faster Rail ($5.75B) - completion 2031
infrastructure_cn: 布里斯班 Metro 车辆段于2024年9月完工
八英里平原 Gateway 邻里规划（2022年11月）
东南公交专用道延伸至 Springwood 已完工
Logan 和黄金海岸快速铁路（57.5亿澳元）- 预计2031年完工

Calamvale.zoning_summary: Low-Medium Density Residential with neighbourhood centres at Algester Road and Beaudesert Road. Townhouse development up to 2-storey along Beaudesert Road.
Calamvale.zoning_summary_cn: 低中密度住宅区为主，Algester Road 和 Beaudesert Road 设有邻里中心。沿 Beaudesert Road 允许建设最高2层联排别墅。人口增长迅速，适合家庭居住。

key_projects.name: Calam Reserve Residential Development
key_projects.name_cn: Calam Reserve 住宅开发
key_projects.description: 28 premium home sites (300-698sqm) by Neptune Homes/Keylin. Rare infill development
key_projects.description_cn: 由 Neptune Homes/Keylin 开发的28个优质住宅地块（300-698平方米）。成熟郊区内难得的填充式开发，适合建造新式独立屋。

key_projects.name: Beaudesert Road Townhouses
key_projects.name_cn: Beaudesert Road 联排别墅
key_projects.description: 86 townhouses (3-4 bed) over 26,554sqm with communal areas, pool, village park
key_projects.description_cn: 占地26,554平方米的86套联排别墅（3-4卧），配有公共区域、泳池和社区公园。适合首次置业者和投资者，社区配套完善。

key_projects.name: Calamvale Community College Expansion
key_projects.name_cn: Calamvale 社区学院扩建
key_projects.description: Education facility enhancement for growing population
key_projects.description_cn: 为应对人口增长的教育设施扩建。Calamvale Community College 是知名一贯制学校，NAPLAN 成绩优秀，是华人家庭选择该区域的重要因素。

infrastructure: Brisbane Metro M1 accessible via Eight Mile Plains station
Logan and Gold Coast Faster Rail ($5.75B) - improved rail connectivity by 2031
Beaudesert Road widening proposed
Population growth 9.9% since 2021 Census
infrastructure_cn: 可通过八英里平原站接驳布里斯班 Metro M1 线
Logan 和黄金海岸快速铁路（57.5亿澳元）- 2031年前改善铁路连通
Beaudesert Road 拓宽已提议
自2021年人口普查以来人口增长9.9%

Rochedale.zoning_summary: Emerging Community Zone, Low-Medium Density Residential, and Mixed Use under Rochedale Urban Community Neighbourhood Plan. Town Centre allows retail, commercial, medium-density residential.
Rochedale.zoning_summary_cn: 根据 Rochedale 城市社区邻里规划，包含新兴社区区、低中密度住宅区和混合用途区。城镇中心允许零售、商业和中密度住宅。布里斯班南区最大的新城市开发区域之一。

key_projects.name: Rochedale Terrace ($380M Masterplan)
key_projects.name_cn: Rochedale Terrace 总体规划（3.8亿澳元）
key_projects.description: 6,000sqm park, retail pavilions, 7-storey hotel, tavern, ~300 apartments by Kinstone on 4-hectare site
key_projects.description_cn: 由 Kinstone 在4公顷地块开发的大型综合项目：6,000平方米公园、零售商铺、7层酒店、酒吧和约300套公寓。总投资3.8亿。将为 Rochedale 引入首个大型商业综合体，预计大幅提升周边房产价值。

key_projects.name: Residential Activation Fund - 1,285 New Homes
key_projects.name_cn: 住房激活基金 - 1,285套新住宅
key_projects.description: QLD Government fast-tracking infrastructure under $2B fund to unlock 1,285 new homes
key_projects.description_cn: 昆士兰州政府通过20亿澳元住房激活基金加快基础设施建设，解锁1,285套新住宅。短期内增加供给但长期利好区域发展。

key_projects.name: Citrine Rochedale Townhouses
key_projects.name_cn: Citrine Rochedale 豪华联排别墅
key_projects.description: $100M luxury 3-4 bedroom townhouse project by Creation Projects
key_projects.description_cn: 由 Creation Projects 开发的1亿澳元豪华联排别墅，3-4卧室，精装修交付，适合追求品质生活的华人家庭。

key_projects.name: Florian Rise Apartments
key_projects.name_cn: Florian Rise 公寓社区
key_projects.description: 188-apartment masterplanned community. Stage 1: 62 apartments in two buildings (3 and 5 storeys)
key_projects.description_cn: 188套公寓的规划社区，第一期62套（3层和5层两栋）。位于 Rochedale 核心位置，步行可达未来商业中心，适合投资者和首次置业者。

infrastructure: Brisbane Metro depot completed in Rochedale area
M1 upgrade completed - new Rochedale bus station and park-n-ride
South East Busway extension to Springwood
Rochedale Urban Community Neighbourhood Plan
infrastructure_cn: 布里斯班 Metro 车辆段在 Rochedale 已完工
M1 升级完成 - 新建 Rochedale 公交站和停车换乘
东南公交专用道延伸至 Springwood
Rochedale 城市社区邻里规划

Mansfield.zoning_summary: Low Density Residential with some Character Residential (pre-1947 protection). Neighbourhood centre at Wecker Road. Parks cover 24.1% of suburb's 4.9 sq km.
Mansfield.zoning_summary_cn: 以低密度住宅区为主，部分特色住宅区（1947年前建筑保护）。Wecker Road 邻里中心。公园覆盖率24.1%，是布里斯班绿化最好的郊区之一。

key_projects.name: Wecker Road Markets Redevelopment
key_projects.name_cn: Wecker Road Markets 综合重建
key_projects.description: Mansfield Tavern site redevelopment: supermarket, health care, gym, food/drink, specialty stores across 3 buildings
key_projects.description_cn: Mansfield Tavern 旧址综合重建：超市、医疗中心、健身房、餐饮和特色商店，3栋建筑。将为 Mansfield 引入大型商业配套，大幅提升日常生活便利性，成为区域商业核心。

key_projects.name: Newnham/Wecker Road Intersection Upgrade
key_projects.name_cn: Newnham/Wecker Road 路口升级
key_projects.description: $13.3M upgrade of intersection handling 35,000 vehicles and 474 buses daily
key_projects.description_cn: 投资1,330万澳元的路口升级，每日处理35,000辆车和474班公交。已完成，显著改善交通流量和安全性。

infrastructure: Brisbane Metro M1 accessible via Eight Mile Plains station
Bulimba Creek sewer upgrade (microtunnelling project)
Cross River Rail (improved network capacity, opening ~2029)
Brisbane 2032 Olympics venue upgrades in broader region
infrastructure_cn: 可通过八英里平原站接驳布里斯班 Metro M1 线
Bulimba Creek 污水管网升级（微型隧道工程）
跨河铁路（提升网络运力，预计2029年开通）
布里斯班2032奥运会场馆升级（大区域范围）

Ascot.zoning_summary: Low Density Residential, Character Residential (heritage areas), Sport and Recreation (Eagle Farm Racecourse). Racecourse Road zoned District Centre with active commercial frontage.
Ascot.zoning_summary_cn: 低密度住宅区、特色住宅区（遗产保护）、体育休闲区（Eagle Farm 赛马场）。Racecourse Road 为区级中心，商业街面活跃。传统富人区之一。

key_projects.name: Ascot Green - Eagle Farm Racecourse
key_projects.name_cn: Ascot Green - Eagle Farm 赛马场住宅
key_projects.description: Part of BRC's $1.2B masterplan. 8 residential towers, 1,100+ apartments by Mirvac. Three towers completed, Stage 2 underway
key_projects.description_cn: 布里斯班赛马俱乐部12亿总体规划的一部分。Mirvac 开发8栋住宅塔楼、超1,100套公寓。三栋已完工，第二阶段建设中。布里斯班内城区最大住宅开发之一，高端公寓生活，吸引大量华人投资买家。

key_projects.name: John Power Grandstand - The Terraces
key_projects.name_cn: John Power 看台 - The Terraces
key_projects.description: New 4-storey tiered grandstand at Eagle Farm Racecourse by Hassell and RWA
key_projects.description_cn: Eagle Farm 赛马场新建4层阶梯式看台，赛马场现代化改造重要一环，提升赛事体验和区域形象。

key_projects.name: 123-125 Racecourse Road Mixed-Use
key_projects.name_cn: Racecourse Road 123-125号混合开发
key_projects.description: 5-storey mixed-use development on Racecourse Road
key_projects.description_cn: Racecourse Road 5层混合用途项目，底层商业零售，上层精品住宅。丰富商业街业态。

infrastructure: Cross River Rail - Shorncliffe line through Eagle Junction to CBD, opening ~2029
Ascot Railway Station on Doomben line
Eagle Farm Racecourse $1.2B masterplan transformation
Brisbane 2032 Olympics transport infrastructure
infrastructure_cn: 跨河铁路 - Shorncliffe 线经 Eagle Junction 至CBD，预计2029年开通
Ascot 火车站位于 Doomben 线
Eagle Farm 赛马场12亿总体改造
布里斯班2032奥运会交通基础设施

Hamilton.zoning_summary: Highly diverse: District Centre along Racecourse Road, Northshore Hamilton Priority Development Area (304 hectares, managed by EDQ). Former industrial/wharf lands transforming to high-density mixed-use.
Hamilton.zoning_summary_cn: 区划高度多样：Racecourse Road 区级中心，Northshore Hamilton 优先开发区（304公顷）。前工业/码头用地向高密度混合用途转型，昆州最大城市更新项目之一。

key_projects.name: Northshore Hamilton Urban Renewal
key_projects.name_cn: Northshore Hamilton 城市更新
key_projects.description: QLD's largest waterfront urban renewal: 304 hectares, 3km river frontage, 14,000+ homes for ~24,500 people. $14B economic contribution. QLD Govt investing $100M+ in enabling infrastructure
key_projects.description_cn: 昆州最大滨水城市更新：304公顷、3公里河岸线，规划14,000+套住宅、约24,500人口，经济贡献140亿。州政府投入1亿+配套基础设施。将把 Hamilton 从工业码头彻底转型为现代滨水社区，类似悉尼 Barangaroo 和墨尔本 Docklands。华人投资者高度关注长期升值潜力。

key_projects.name: Hamilton Grove (Wentworth Equities)
key_projects.name_cn: Hamilton Grove 综合体
key_projects.description: 3-tower mixed-use at 19 Hercules Street within Northshore PDA. Residential with ground-level retail/dining
key_projects.description_cn: Northshore 内 Hercules Street 19号的3栋塔楼混合项目，住宅为主，底层零售餐饮。将率先定义该区域社区氛围和品质标准。

key_projects.name: Racecourse Road Mixed-Use (Graya)
key_projects.name_cn: Racecourse Road 混合开发（Graya）
key_projects.description: 4-storey mixed-use: 8 commercial tenancies, 37 apartments with rooftop communal spaces
key_projects.description_cn: Graya 开发4层混合项目：8个商业租户、37套公寓、屋顶公共空间。为 Racecourse Road 商业街注入更多活力。

infrastructure: Northshore Hamilton PDA Development Scheme amended Nov 2025
QLD Government $100M+ enabling infrastructure for Northshore (delivery by early-mid 2028)
Riverfront parklands delivery planned for 2029
New school planned within Northshore PDA
Cross River Rail improved rail network capacity, opening ~2029
Brisbane 2032 Olympics - Northshore land repurposed for residential/mixed-use
infrastructure_cn: Northshore Hamilton 开发方案2025年11月修订
州政府1亿+ Northshore 配套基础设施（2028年上半年交付）
河滨公园绿地计划2029年交付
Northshore 内规划新建学校
跨河铁路提升运力，预计2029年开通
2032奥运会 - Northshore 用地改造为住宅/混合用途
